series_metadata.series_title: Precedent Setting Decisions Involving Lower & Higher Authority Appeals & Court Appeals
series_metadata.series_description: Decisions on all appeals of cases coming to the Unemployment Compensation Review Commission. Includes decisions on cases involving any unemployment, compensation appeal, further appeal, tax liability, federal program, mass or labor dispute, delinquent account, employer contribution, or from the Courts. Precedent setting decisions are a compilation of decisions which illustrate precedent in new and unusual cases and decisions which serve as examples of frequently encountered situations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in records center for 10 years, then destroy provided no legal action is pending. ; Electronic: Retain decisions in electronic format permanently., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
